id: When She Loved Me Sarah McLachlan
folderName: When She Loved Me Sarah McLachlan
setting: Two friends talking at a coffee shop about an old friendship that faded away.
lyrics:
When somebody loved me
Everything was beautiful
Every hour we spent together
Lives within my heart

And when she was sad, I was there to dry her tears
And when she was happy, so was I
When she loved me

Through the summer and the fall
We had each other, that was all
Just she and I together
Like it was meant to be

And when she was lonely
I was there to comfort her
And I knew that she loved me

So the years went by, I stayed the same
But she began to drift away
I was left alone
Still, I waited for the day
When she'd say, "I will always love you"

Lonely and forgotten
Never thought she'd look my way
And she smiled at me and held me
Just like she used to do
Like she loved me
When she loved me

When somebody loved me
Everything was beautiful
Every hour we spent together
Lives within my heart

When she loved me

lyricsJa.en:
When somebody loved me
Everything was beautiful
lyricsJa.ja:
誰かに愛されていたあの頃
すべてが輝いて見えた

lyricsJa.en:
Every hour we spent together
Lives within my heart
lyricsJa.ja:
共に過ごしたかけがえのない時間は
今もこの胸の中で生きている

lyricsJa.en:
And when she was sad, I was there to dry her tears
And when she was happy, so was I
lyricsJa.ja:
悲しい時は涙を拭ってあげたし
嬉しい時は一緒に喜びを分かち合った
あの子が私を愛してくれた頃

lyricsJa.en:
Through the summer and the fall
We had each other, that was all
lyricsJa.ja:
夏も秋も、ただ二人いれば
それだけで十分だった

lyricsJa.en:
Just she and I together
Like it was meant to be
lyricsJa.ja:
二人でいるのが
当たり前の運命だと思っていた

lyricsJa.en:
And when she was lonely
I was there to comfort her
lyricsJa.ja:
あの子が寂しい時はいつも
私がそばで元気づけてあげた

lyricsJa.en: And I knew that she loved me
lyricsJa.ja: 愛されているって、ちゃんと分かっていたから

lyricsJa.en:
So the years went by, I stayed the same
But she began to drift away
lyricsJa.ja:
月日は流れ、私は変わらないのに
あの子の心は少しずつ離れていった

lyricsJa.en:
I was left alone
Still, I waited for the day
lyricsJa.ja:
一人取り残されても
私はずっと待ち続けていた

lyricsJa.en: When she'd say, "I will always love you"
lyricsJa.ja:
「いつまでも大好きだよ」と
あの子が言ってくれるその日を

lyricsJa.en:
Lonely and forgotten
Never thought she'd look my way
lyricsJa.ja:
忘れ去られて孤独な日々
もう二度と目が合うことはないと思っていた

lyricsJa.en:
And she smiled at me and held me
Just like she used to do
lyricsJa.ja:
だけどあの子は微笑んで抱きしめてくれた
あの頃と変わらない優しさで

lyricsJa.en:
Like she loved me
When she loved me
lyricsJa.ja:
私を愛してくれていた
あの頃と同じように

lyricsJa.en:
When somebody loved me
Everything was beautiful
lyricsJa.ja:
誰かに愛されていたあの頃
すべてが輝いて見えた

lyricsJa.en:
Every hour we spent together
Lives within my heart
lyricsJa.ja:
共に過ごしたかけがえのない時間は
今もこの胸の中で生きている
あの子が私を愛してくれた頃

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I saw my old best friend today.
sentences.displayHtml: I saw my old best friend today.

sentences.text: We hadn't talked in years.
sentences.displayHtml: We hadn't talked in years.

conversation.japanese: 今日、昔の親友に会ったの。もう何年も話してなかったんだけど。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Wow, really?
sentences.displayHtml: Wow, really?

sentences.text: You two used to be inseparable, right?
sentences.displayHtml: You two used to be inseparable, right?

conversation.japanese: え、マジで？ふたりっていつも一緒だったよね？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Yeah.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah.

sentences.text: We had each other, and that was all we needed.
sentences.displayHtml: We had each other, and that was all we needed.

sentences.text: Through the summer and the fall, we did everything together.
sentences.displayHtml: Through the summer and the fall, we did everything together.

conversation.japanese: うん。お互いがいれば、それだけでよかった。夏も秋も、何でも一緒にやったよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: So what happened?
sentences.displayHtml: So what happened?

sentences.text: Why did you drift apart?
sentences.displayHtml: Why did you drift apart?

conversation.japanese: じゃあ何があったの？なんで離れちゃったの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: The years went by and she just started changing.
sentences.displayHtml: The years went by and she just started changing.

sentences.text: I stayed the same, but she began to drift away.
sentences.displayHtml: I stayed the same, but she began to drift away.

sentences.text: I was kind of left alone.
sentences.displayHtml: I was kind of left alone.

conversation.japanese: 年月が経って、あの子はどんどん変わっていった。私は変わらなかったのに、あの子は少しずつ離れていって。置いていかれた感じだった。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: That must have been tough.
sentences.displayHtml: That must have been tough.

sentences.text: Did you try reaching out?
sentences.displayHtml: Did you try reaching out?

conversation.japanese: それはつらかったね。連絡してみたりしなかったの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Not really.
sentences.displayHtml: Not really.

sentences.text: I just kept waiting for the day she'd come back.
sentences.displayHtml: I just kept waiting for the day she'd come back.

sentences.text: I felt so lonely and forgotten.
sentences.displayHtml: I felt so lonely and forgotten.

sentences.text: I never thought she'd look my way again.
sentences.displayHtml: I never thought she'd look my way again.

conversation.japanese: ううん。いつか戻ってきてくれるのをずっと待ってた。すごく寂しくて、忘れられたみたいで。もう振り向いてくれないと思ってた。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: But you said you saw her today.
sentences.displayHtml: But you said you saw her today.

sentences.text: What happened?
sentences.displayHtml: What happened?

conversation.japanese: でも今日会ったんでしょ？どうだったの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: She smiled at me and held me, just like she used to do.
sentences.displayHtml: She smiled at me and held me, just like she used to do.

sentences.text: And I realized that every hour we spent together still lives within my heart.
sentences.displayHtml: And I realized that every hour we spent together still lives within my heart.

conversation.japanese: あの子、笑って抱きしめてくれたの、昔みたいに。一緒に過ごした時間は全部、まだ胸の中にあるんだなって気づいた。
